description: Register an HTTP resource (base URL + auth header) for use by other components

resource_key.label: Resource Key
resource_key.description: Key used to register this resource. Other components reference it via resource_key.

base_url.label: Base URL
base_url.description: Base URL for all requests, e.g. 'https://api.example.com/v1'

auth_header_env_var.label: Auth Header Env Var
auth_header_env_var.description: Env var containing the Authorization header value, e.g. 'Bearer token123'
